statement.headerDoc:
STEP SumOf3Cubes — Sum of three cubes problem (Mordell / Heath-Brown)
  =====================================================================

  Problem: which n ∈ ℕ admit n = x³ + y³ + z³ with x, y, z ∈ ℤ?

  Known obstruction: n ≡ ±4 (mod 9) has NO representation (since x³ mod 9
  ∈ {-1, 0, 1}; sum of three is at most ±3 mod 9).

  Heath-Brown 1992 conjecture: every n ≢ ±4 (mod 9) has infinitely many
  representations. OPEN.

  Landmark computational results:
    - n=33: x³+y³+z³ = 33 had no known solution until Booker 2019 found
      (8866128975287528, -8778405442862239, -2736111468807040)

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
